reviews.review_description: This is something that's quite unique on the go, it's a game you keep wanting to play, not a five minute wonder. Nice colourful Graphics and simple play but you will want another go again & again. Great Fun. Thanks

reviews.review_title: 3Dversion of one of favorite iPad games
reviews.review_description: Simple, mindless, but enjoyable. Glad I installed it.
My wife and I compete for high scores on this - it's the only game she's interested in playing on the Go.

I love this game its like tetris and sudoku had a baby lol and it is so addicting, really u will be playing this little gem for hours. Great job devs cant wait to whats in the next update so far im loving every minute of it!!! highly recommend

The kind of game you jump in for "just one game" and end up trying to beat your own best score, make your way to the leaderboard or just shoot bubbles and enjoy your time!

Visuals - game is looking good. Bright colors but not aggresive on the eyes. Just enough animation not to distract you from the game but not being too static

Gameplay - Good gameplay. It's a simple yet effective game. No bug seen so far! really easy to understand how to play and what's going on

Replayability - Its quite repetitive but really addictive. It's the kind of game you don't mind repeating the same task over and over. Think Candy crush and such games. It's a game anyone can spend time in and comeback later to have just as much fun!

This game was a great distraction, with many fun mechanics. The idea was great, and we had nothing else like it in the store! Very enjoyable colors, and everything works fine, including the power ups, which definitely add a replay able element to it. Sound effects are good, and leaderboards work fine. Multiple modes, with increasing difficulty are a great idea, and I can’t wait to see more progress
This is a simple game that I absolutely love.  I wish I could get it on the Quest as well.
I bought this so my grandchildren would have a simple game to play but I find myself anticipating the next time I get to play it.
Beyond basic, one level(in 3 colors) with no goals, upgrades or anything at all to keep you around more than 10 minutes. It should be free.

reviews.review_title: Cute game to eat up time
reviews.review_description:
If you are just relaxing and want to play a game that doesn’t require too much “gamer skill”, then you need to try this one. 
It’s pretty easy and fun. 
I would recommend it.
A great game to pick up and play anytime. Gameplay is simple with a few different modes to keep things interesting. Definitely worth the price paid!

Dev may be interested that you cannot find "boba pop" by doing a search on Oculus store web or app. Google doesn't find it either, but gave Facebook page link from which you can get here! 

I enjoyed playing it and could play for hours. Puzzle game with hints of pool, tetris, breakout. Didn't hold 9 y/o attention for too long though, wanted to be able to upgrade his ball or other things. Good value though.

reviews.review_title: A challenging fun app for any age group
reviews.review_description: At first it looks like a simple app with not too much repeat play but after a few games I found it really challenging and addicting! If you're like me and pretty new to VR this is a must even if you've never had a boba drink lol. I could get the wife to play any games until this one, good for all ages and not a huge learning curve if you are new to VR. Now if only I can get on the leader board!
